nodes.label: Favicon SVG
nodes.rationale: Styled SVG logo with a dark background (#141516), a red gradient inner square (#c84c36 to #7c2317), and three white shapes resembling 'l i l' or 'l i f' symbolizing the application's name or brand.

nodes.label: Operating Score Widget
nodes.rationale: Weighted formula (40% task throughput, 30% daily habit consistency, 30% learning progress) is used to calculate a single overall Operating Score indicating daily productivity balance.

nodes.label: Gallery Module Content UI
nodes.rationale: A distraction-free reading UI featuring a dark mode theme, header with word count and estimated reading time, typography controls, and a persistent timer indicating a focused learning session.
